default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss content strategy, resource allocation, and ongoing projects for Airbyte's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production may double (80-100 pieces/month), but implementation needs careful planning](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Website redesign is a priority; some work streams (e.g., landing pages) should wait until completion](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Balance needed between LLM-optimized content and traditional SEO/editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Gong call analysis identified as a potential first work stream to tackle](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Scaling

  - [Potential increase from 40 to 80-100 pieces/month](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Bandwidth concerns addressed; can't do everything simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Mario suggests focusing on 2 work streams at a time](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Internal team members (e.g., Kusha) can assist with content review](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [Currently rebuilding entire website; expected completion in 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Mainly cosmetic changes for blog; structural changes to be discussed later](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Landing page updates should wait until new website is live to avoid double work](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### Gong Call Analysis

  - [7,000 Gong calls available for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Data team can export calls to S3, BigQuery, or Snowflake](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Airbyte connector for Gong can be utilized](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Current formatting in BigQuery needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Content Strategy and LLMs

  - [Balance needed between LLM-optimized and traditional content](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Focus on answering specific questions and targeting long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Commercial and "commercial adjacent" content still valuable (e.g., software lists, alternatives, versus pages)](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Avoid generic content like glossaries, which are being dominated by AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Cluster content intentionally and interlink tightly for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Visual Content Improvements

  - [Implement more visual elements (charts, flowcharts, tables) to enhance readability and LLM understanding](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Use AI to create some in-article images](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Optimize alt text for keywords to improve Google Image Search performance](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [David and Jakub to collaborate on developing a system for creating relevant visuals](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Current Content Progress

  - [19 articles pushed, with more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [15 new articles being delivered](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Recent formatting issues have been resolved](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tammy to review recently submitted articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Mario and Tammy to discuss which work streams to prioritize beyond regular article production](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Jakub to share meeting insights with George for strategy sprint planning](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [David and Jakub to develop a system for creating and implementing visual content](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Team to continue balancing LLM-optimized content with traditional editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Explore Gong call analysis as a potential first additional work stream](https://fathom.video/share/SxQK8CsfxR6ytxnK9ywUCXBYx2iMy88z?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

action_items.description: Share meeting transcript with George re: Gong call analysis, discuss with engineering team
Review strategy document sent by George on Monday, provide feedback
Review 3 new articles submitted by David, provide feedback within a day
Experiment with AI-generated charts/graphs for in-article images, develop process for visual content creation
Discuss with Tammy which work stream to pick besides usual articles, report back to team
Have longer discussion with Mario about structural changes for blog in website redesign
